description: Records asset consolidations applied during ingestion. Where multiple submitted entries represent sub-components or sub-products of a single dataset they are merged into one record. Update this file when new consolidations are agreed.

merged_names: CCAFS-Climate data portal - statistical downscaling CIMP5
CCAFS-Climate data portal - statistical downscaling CIMP6
CCAFS-Climate data portal -temporal bias correction of daily data
applied.consolidated_name: CCAFS-Climate data portal (MarkSim, CMIP5/6 downscaling, bias correction)
applied.rationale: Four sub-products of the same CCAFS-Climate platform submitted as separate entries
Two model runs of the same product submitted as separate entries

merged_names: Spatial Assessments of Changes in Soil Health Indicators in Benin
Spatial Assessments of Changes in Soil Health Indicators in Kenya
applied.consolidated_name: Spatial Assessments of Changes in Soil Health Indicators (Benin, Kenya)
applied.rationale: Same dataset applied in two countries submitted as separate entries

merged_names: VECTRI Climate Forcing and Preprocessed Dataset
VECTRI Malaria Model Output Dataset for Ethiopia

applied.rationale: Model inputs and outputs from same pipeline submitted as separate entries

recommended_catalogue.note: Africa Flood Hazard and Africa Drought Hazard are component layers of Africa Multi-hazard Risk Maps — consider cataloguing as one entry with sub-layers (3 → 1)
'Global harmonized cropland' and 'Time series of global harmonized cropland extent 2011-2020' are static and temporal versions of the same product — consider one catalogue record (2 → 1)
